---
title: "Helen\'s Babies, with some Account of their Ways Innocent, Crafty, Angelic, Impish, Witching, and Repulsive . . . by their Latest Victim"
---

## Helen\'s Babies, with some Account of their Ways Innocent, Crafty, Angelic, Impish, Witching, and Repulsive . . . by their Latest Victim

**Author:** John Habberton
**Date:** 1876
**Imprint:** Boston: Loring

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
